metadata.title: DBC File Field Reference (Vector CANoe 15.0)
metadata.description: Comprehensive reference of all DBC file keywords, attributes, object types, and their usage.

syntax_keywords.name: VERSION
syntax_keywords.description: DBC file format version. The canonical value is an empty string. v15 supports up to 14 named tags.

syntax_keywords.name: NS_
syntax_keywords.syntax: NS_ : NS_DESC_ CM_ BA_DEF_ BA_ VAL_TABLE_ ...
syntax_keywords.description: New Symbols declaration. Lists all reserved identifier names used in the file.

syntax_keywords.name: BS_
syntax_keywords.description: Bus Speed. v15 deprecates this in favor of BA_DEF_ BusSpeed attribute.

syntax_keywords.name: BU_
syntax_keywords.description: Bus nodes (ECUs). Lists all network nodes in the database.

syntax_keywords.name: VAL_TABLE_
syntax_keywords.description: Value table definition. v15 supports up to 2^31-1 entries per table.

syntax_keywords.name: BO_
syntax_keywords.description: Message definition. v15: MsgId can be extended (29-bit) or standard (11-bit).

syntax_keywords.name: SG_
syntax_keywords.description: Signal definition. v15 supports multiplexed signals (M, m) and value ranges.

syntax_keywords.name: EV_
syntax_keywords.description: Environment variable for non-bus data. v15 adds ENV_VAR_DATA semantics.

syntax_keywords.name: CM_
syntax_keywords.description: Comment. v15 supports multi-line comments and Unicode.

syntax_keywords.name: BA_DEF_
syntax_keywords.description: Attribute definition. v15 supports ENUM, FLOAT, INTEGER, STRING, HEX, HEX_LONG.

syntax_keywords.name: BA_
syntax_keywords.description: Attribute value assignment. Sets the value of a previously defined attribute.

syntax_keywords.name: VAL_
syntax_keywords.description: Value description for a signal. Used for textual state display.

syntax_keywords.name: CAT_DEF_
syntax_keywords.description: Category definition (v15). Allows messages to be visually grouped in CANeds.

syntax_keywords.name: CAT_
syntax_keywords.description: Message category assignment (v15).

syntax_keywords.name: FILTER
syntax_keywords.description: Bus filter (v15). Restricts bus traffic to specified node/message combination.

syntax_keywords.name: BA_DEF_SG_
syntax_keywords.description: Signal-group specific attribute definition. v15 supports this for vCDL signals.

syntax_keywords.name: SIG_GROUP_
syntax_keywords.description: Signal group definition. v15: signals in a group must be from the same message and non-overlapping.

syntax_keywords.name: SIG_VALTYPE_
syntax_keywords.description: Signal value type (v15). Specifies IEEE_FLOAT or IEEE_DOUBLE encoding.

syntax_keywords.name: BO_TX_BU_
syntax_keywords.description: Transmitter relation (v15). Allows multiple senders for a message.

syntax_keywords.name: RX_BU_
syntax_keywords.description: Receiver relation (deprecated in v15). Replaced by SG_ <SigName> <Receivers> field.
